name: Artisanal Polo Knit
description: Crafted from a premium cotton-linen blend, this short-sleeve polo knit shirt features a clean open collar, ribbed trims, and a relaxed silhouette perfect for warm weather.

name: Relaxed Cotton Tee
description: An everyday essential. Made from heavyweight 100% organic cotton, this t-shirt offers a structured drape, dropped shoulders, and a clean crew neck.

name: Artistic Print Tee
description: Featuring a subtle abstract screenprint across the chest, this relaxed-fit tee is cut from soft, breathable cotton single jersey.

name: Oversized Denim Shirt
description: Constructed from 12oz Japanese denim, this button-up shirt features utility chest pockets, contrast stitching, and an oversized aesthetic.

name: Structured Denim Jeans
description: Classic straight-leg jeans crafted from rigid raw denim. Designed to wear in beautifully over time, featuring a button fly and five-pocket styling.

name: Layered Cotton Tee
description: A double-layered t-shirt offering a modern layered contrast look at the sleeves and hem. Made from premium lightweight pima cotton.

name: Linen Summer Shirt
description: Cut for a relaxed fit, this short-sleeve summer shirt is crafted from 100% breathable flax linen. Features a resort collar and a curved hem.

name: Knitted Zip Polo
description: A contemporary knit polo featuring a metal quarter-zip closure, ribbed collar, and fine-gauge knit structure in a rich olive-gray hue.
